import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { useCart } from '../context/CartContext'; import './Navbar.css'; const Navbar = ({ currentPage, setCurrentPage, openAppointmentModal }) => { const { getCartCount, getCartTotal } = useCart(); const cartCount = getCartCount(); const cartTotal = getCartTotal(); return ( <> {/* Top Header Section */}
{/* Contact Info */}
📞 +1 (555) 123-4567 ✉️ info@gemsofinsight.com
{/* Social Media Icons */}
{/* Main Navigation */}
{/* Logo Section */}
{/* Navigation Links */}
{/* Right Section */}
{cartCount > 0 && {cartCount}}
Basket KSH {cartTotal.toLocaleString()}
); }; export default Navbar;
